requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — ISC (CS Standards) and EAC Cambodia Grid-Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——ISC（CS标准）及EAC柬埔寨并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——ISC（CS標準）及EAC柬埔寨併網要求

summary.en: The Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) develops Cambodian Standards (CS) by adopting IEC publications. For solar PV inverter safety, CS standards adopt IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). EAC (Electricity Authority of Cambodia) references IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence as part of the technical requirements for PV inverter grid-connection approval in Cambodia. Third-party type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected for project submissions to EAC and for utility-scale procurement. Cambodia's growing rooftop C&I and National Solar Park projects follow IEC-aligned safety evidence requirements consistent with ISC CS standard adoption.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨标准院（ISC）通过采纳IEC出版物制定柬埔寨标准（CS）。对于太阳能光伏逆变器安全，CS标准采纳IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。EAC（柬埔寨电力局）将IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据作为柬埔寨光伏逆变器并网审批技术要求的一部分。向EAC提交项目及公用事业规模采购通常要求来自ILAC认可实验室的第三方型式试验证据。柬埔寨日益增长的工商业屋顶和国家太阳能园区项目遵循与ISC柬埔寨标准采纳一致的IEC安全证据要求。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨標準院（ISC）通過採納IEC出版物制定柬埔寨標準（CS）。對於太陽能光伏逆變器安全，CS標準採納IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。EAC（柬埔寨電力局）將IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據作為柬埔寨光伏逆變器併網審批技術要求的一部分。向EAC提交項目及公用事業規模採購通常要求來自ILAC認可實驗室的第三方型式試驗證據。柬埔寨日益增長的工商業屋頂和國家太陽能園區項目遵循與ISC柬埔寨標準採納一致的IEC安全證據要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (adopted as CS / referenced in EAC grid-connection requirements)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (implicitly applicable as parent standard)
ISC Cambodian Standards (CS) adopting IEC 62109-1/-2 — verify adoption status at isc.gov.kh
EAC grid-connection project approval — IEC safety evidence requirements embedded in technical review

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which covers classification, environmental conditions, safety, electrical performance, EMC, and markings. GB/T 37408 is a China domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by EAC Cambodia or ISC as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Chinese inverters for Cambodia must supplement GB/T 37408 certification with IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求），涵盖分类、环境条件、安全、电气性能、EMC和标识。GB/T 37408是由中国CNAS认可实验室评估的中国国内标准。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被EAC柬埔寨或ISC接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。用于柬埔寨的中国逆变器须以来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告补充GB/T 37408认证。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求），涵蓋分類、環境條件、安全、電氣性能、EMC和標識。GB/T 37408是由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估的中國國內標準。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被EAC柬埔寨或ISC接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。用於柬埔寨的中國逆變器須以來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告補充GB/T 37408認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Cambodia EAC/ISC IEC 62109-2 type-test requirements for PV inverter grid-connection. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied to Cambodia. Existing Chinese safety certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting equipment documentation for EAC project review or EDC utility-connection approval. Verify current ISC CS adoption status for IEC 62109-1/-2 and current EAC technical requirements directly with the relevant authorities.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408安全认证不满足柬埔寨EAC/ISC光伏逆变器并网IEC 62109-2型式试验要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖供应至柬埔寨的特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。仅依据GB/T 37408的现有中国安全证书，在提交EAC项目审查或EDC电力接入审批所需设备文件前，应补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。请直接向相关机构核实ISC对IEC 62109-1/-2的当前CS采纳状态及EAC当前技术要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足柬埔寨EAC/ISC光伏逆變器併網IEC 62109-2型式試驗要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋供應至柬埔寨的特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。僅依據GB/T 37408的現有中國安全證書，在提交EAC項目審查或EDC電力接入審批所需設備文件前，應補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。請直接向相關機構核實ISC對IEC 62109-1/-2的當前CS採納狀態及EAC當前技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for EAC Cambodia grid-connection project submission; IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence is required for EAC technical review; ISC CS adoption aligns with IEC 62109 framework — verify adoption status at isc.gov.kh
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Cambodia EAC/ISC IEC 62109-2 grid-connection requirements. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for Cambodia EAC project review or EDC connection. Verify current ISC CS adoption status and EAC technical specification version directly with ISC at isc.gov.kh and EAC at eac.gov.kh before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足柬埔寨EAC/ISC的IEC 62109-2并网要求。请在提交柬埔寨EAC项目审查或EDC接入所需设备文件前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。在启动测试计划前，请直接在isc.gov.kh向ISC核实当前CS采纳状态，并在eac.gov.kh向EAC核实EAC技术规格版本。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足柬埔寨EAC/ISC的IEC 62109-2併網要求。請在提交柬埔寨EAC項目審查或EDC接入所需設備文件前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。在啟動測試計畫前，請直接在isc.gov.kh向ISC核實當前CS採納狀態，並在eac.gov.kh向EAC核實EAC技術規格版本。
